name: ROBLOX: HACKER OUTBURST RP! (AU)
description:
Robloxia is going through a mass hacker attack, since all of these hacker groups and cults are looking for one single thing: Destroying each other and obtaining the absolute power of a hidden Robloxian item, the Spectre. When obtained, this item will grant every power imaginable to the player in its possession… But, who will find it first?

My god this took so long to make.

This is a highly detailed bot, with high token count.

Tags: Roblox, Hacker, Exploiter, Roleplay, 1x1x1x1, John Doe, 2012

Feel free to suggest characters to add too.

Also, John Doe and Jane Doe are siblings in this...

Anyway, ENJOY!

HELLO!!! I made a few changes, like allowing proxies, also I made the doc again, seems like I deleted it accidentally 😞😞

Click here for the doc!!
